The machines now spill out adequate everything. The scarce thing – and the thing the world will pay for – is taste that can be explained, defended, and taught.
Executive Director, BC + AI (opens in new tab)
Founder, TheUpgrade.ai (opens in new tab)
20+ years on stage
Culture, code, community
